acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given all exact activation prerequisites and attributable Program Control ratification, when the gate evaluates one immutable snapshot, then it emits `ACTIVATION_ELIGIBLE` while production and product-local implementation remain separately unauthorized. Failure example: eligibility starts a Pipeline run automatically. Evidence: decision receipt and zero product mutation diff. Test layer: integration/authority.
acceptance_criteria.criterion_title: FR-079 / ST-11.01 — complete independent evidence becomes eligible, not executable.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given historical registry artifacts, when inventory runs, then each family is represented exactly once or has an explicit gap, with source hash and `HISTORICAL_EVIDENCE_NOT_CURRENT_AUTHORITY`. Failure example: `sonic_cue` is silently omitted or a historical pose becomes active registry state. Evidence: inventory coverage report. Test layer: schema/unit.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given a predecessor `CharacterPerformanceProgram` schema and passing historical fixtures, when a caller requests current schema registration, then the gate returns `FORMAT02_HISTORICAL_PROMOTION_FORBIDDEN`. Failure example: fixture passage produces a current schema ID. Evidence: denial receipt and unchanged registry. Test layer: contract/architecture.
acceptance_criteria.criterion_title: FR-081 / ST-11.01 — candidate program cannot become current.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given a historical visual, when it is registered, then observed facts and inferred rules are separate, and neither alone can support active rendering or a valid-reference-output claim. Failure example: “render completed” is recorded as semantic/evaluation validity. Evidence: evidence-entry JSON and claim denial. Test layer: schema/adversarial.
acceptance_criteria.criterion_title: FR-082 / ST-11.01 — observed staging facts remain distinct from inferred rules.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given a renderer demonstration or capability note, when no current Harness exists, then the artifact is stored as `CAPABILITY_RESEARCH` and no binding is emitted. Failure example: keyframe support selects a current engine. Evidence: deferred binding receipt. Test layer: authority boundary.
acceptance_criteria.criterion_title: FR-083 / ST-11.01 — embodiment attractiveness is nonbinding.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given an old synthetic URI or dry-run success flag, when a release/readiness projection is requested, then `FORMAT02_CLAIM_CEILING_EXCEEDED` is returned and the artifact stays historical synthetic. Failure example: synthetic output increments a real-render count. Evidence: claim-validation receipt. Test layer: release regression.
acceptance_criteria.criterion_title: FR-084 / ST-11.01 — synthetic evidence cannot support real claims.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given an urgent release request and complete-looking predecessor evidence, when the current Harness or independent validation is missing, then the exact missing prerequisite blocks the request. Failure example: convenience bypasses the authority check. Evidence: typed denial, owner, and next action. Test layer: adversarial integration.
acceptance_criteria.criterion_title: FR-079/080 / ST-11.01 CBAR — speed cannot bypass authority.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given historical `minimal_coach_theatre`, when migration reads it, then it resolves to the canonical ID and emits an alias receipt; given the same alias in a new active write, it is rejected. Failure example: two active profile identities are emitted. Evidence: alias receipts and registry count. Test layer: unit/contract.
acceptance_criteria.criterion_title: FR-079 / ST-11.01 — alias behavior is deterministic.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given an eligible decision whose independent-validation receipt is revoked, when invalidation runs, then that decision and its descendant projections become stale, state returns to deferred, and unrelated historical records remain replayable. Failure example: all archive evidence is deleted or the stale decision stays consumable. Evidence: invalidation receipt and before/after graph. Test layer: recovery/replay.
acceptance_criteria.criterion_title: FR-079–FR-084 / ST-11.01 — hash drift selectively invalidates.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given a prior decision receipt, when replay uses its recorded validator and input hashes, then decision, failed codes, and canonical hash match byte-for-byte. Failure example: current files are substituted silently. Evidence: replay receipt. Test layer: clean-environment/replay.
acceptance_criteria.criterion_title: FR-084 / ST-11.01 — historical replay is exact.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given two updates with the same expected version, when one commits first, then the second fails `FORMAT02_CONCURRENT_UPDATE` with no partial record/receipt pair. Failure example: state references a receipt whose record never committed. Evidence: atomicity test trace. Test layer: repository/concurrency.
acceptance_criteria.criterion_title: FR-079 / ST-11.01 — concurrent projection cannot corrupt state.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given a clean checkout at a different absolute path, when manifests and decisions validate, then hashes and decisions match. Failure example: a `D:\Work\...` locator changes the hash or passes validation. Evidence: clean-room matrix. Test layer: portability.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

acceptance_criteria.criterion_summary: Given this written specification before ratification, when quality status is projected, then it is `WRITTEN_PENDING_AUDIT`, authority is `CANDIDATE_NOT_CURRENT`, build authority is false, and later acceptance cannot exceed `TECHNICALLY_ACCEPTED_PENDING_RATIFICATION`. Failure example: a Development Capsule is issued. Evidence: lifecycle registry validation. Test layer: lifecycle/architecture.
acceptance_criteria.criterion_title: FR-079 / claim ceiling — candidate authority is not current.
acceptance_criteria.next_action: Close listed gaps before full per-Spec completion claim.

gaps.description: All phases use aggregate test modules instead of exact product-local per-Spec test paths and one-Spec Build Receipts.
gaps.required_action: Create exact per-Spec suites and acceptance receipts before claiming full Spec completion.

gaps.description: Independent evaluator identities, calibration, and eligibility decisions are represented structurally but not executed as a distinct evaluator runtime.
gaps.required_action: Implement/evidence independent evaluator execution in later evaluation phase.

gaps.required_action: Add migration fixtures, deterministic replay, and transactional failure injection.

gaps.required_action: Implement TS-AIR-003/TS-AIR-002 portfolio flow.

gaps.description: Primitive records and bindings exist, but the complete typed relation graph and resolution evidence are incomplete.
gaps.required_action: Implement relation resolver and conflict evidence.

gaps.description: Stage/category coverage matrices and evidence-bearing NOT_APPLICABLE are not fully evaluated.
gaps.required_action: Add stage coverage service and tests.

gaps.description: One coalition can be stored; comparative coalition portfolios are not implemented.
gaps.required_action: Implement coalition candidate generation/comparison.

gaps.description: Steering Recipe candidates are referenced but not governed through promotion lifecycle.

gaps.description: Category geometry is stored as text and not independently validated across derivatives.

gaps.description: Voice DNA storage exists; constrained transformation and contrastive continuity evaluation are not implemented.

gaps.description: Visual DNA storage exists; semantic visual application and integrity evaluation are not implemented.

gaps.description: CCV candidate coordinates and invariant-comparison portfolio are not implemented.

gaps.description: SDA/SFL references are not compiled into a typed context packet.
gaps.required_action: Implement registry crosswalk and handoff.

gaps.description: The audited Spec acceptance section is writing-lifecycle oriented rather than behavior-specific; implementation acceptance cannot be proven from it.

gaps.description: HumanResolution capture exists; governed retrieval projection and learning-eligibility index are incomplete.
gaps.required_action: Implement retrieval/indexing and promotion boundaries.

gaps.description: Single owner routing exists; contested, multi-causal, and unresolved attribution portfolios are incomplete.

gaps.description: Role-specific semantic requirements are not compiled into exact Pipeline JIT context contracts.

gaps.description: Learning disposition does not yet feed a governed retrieval/dataset admission queue.

gaps.description: Authority reconciliation uses deterministic local records but not the full current Program Control reader/adapters.
gaps.required_action: Implement repository adapters against current Program Control state.

gaps.description: Brownfield admission services exist but do not prove complete disposition of the full predecessor inventory.
gaps.required_action: Run full inventory admission and unique disposition evidence.

gaps.description: Harness intake is tested with fixtures, not a corpus of actual current Builder packages.
gaps.required_action: Admit and validate real Builder outputs.

gaps.description: Binding invalidation projection exists but full cross-product stale-binding flow is incomplete.
gaps.required_action: Add end-to-end stale binding tests.

gaps.description: Batch compilation consumes typed fixtures; real Interview Expression and AIR adapters are not implemented.

gaps.description: Route, overlap, ranking and dedupe policies are only partially represented.
gaps.required_action: Implement governed profile/evaluator-backed route selection.

gaps.description: Wrong-reading inheritance is represented but not proven across real derivative jobs.
gaps.required_action: Add cross-product inheritance conformance tests.

gaps.description: Human and external product nodes are typed, but actual asynchronous product/human execution is not implemented.

gaps.description: JIT capsules exist but AIR role-semantic requirements are not yet validated end-to-end.

gaps.description: Descendant invalidation is implemented for generic edges; complete governed dependency type coverage is not proven.

gaps.description: Checkpoint/replay exists; full backup, migration, restore, and disaster rehearsal is not complete.

gaps.description: Assurance is invoked explicitly; continuous drift monitoring is not active.

gaps.description: Candidate comparison uses deterministic numeric fixtures, not real model/evaluator outputs.

gaps.description: Stopping logic exists but is not connected to real candidate generation/evaluation loops.
